name: China Leadshine Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: China Leadshine Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells motion control products in the worldwide. The company's products include stepper drives and motors, integrated steppers, closed loop stepper drives and motors, integrated easy servo motors, integrated servo motors, brushless and brushed servo drives and motors, PC based and standalone motion controllers, power supplies, and companion accessories. Its products are used in OEM applications and industries, such as CNC machinery, semiconductor, electronics, inkjet printing, medical, packaging, lab automation, textile, etc. China Leadshine Technology Co., Ltd. markets its products through its global distribution network, which include local distributors. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
